name: M:GTA.Math.Quaternion.RotationYawPitchRoll(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
summary: Creates a Quaternion from the given yaw, pitch, and roll, in radians.

params.name: yaw
params.description: The yaw angle, in radians, around the Z-axis.

params.name: pitch
params.description: The pitch angle, in radians, around the X-axis.

params.name: roll
params.description: The roll angle, in radians, around the Y-axis.
